high_level_description: Post-local TaraHome editorial cover for a guide about Home Assistant automations running twice. A warm real door/window sensor scene shows two physical sensors on one opening with tiny green local-control status lights, representing duplicate triggers from one household event. No embedded title text, logos, screenshots, fake charts, UI cards, translucent panels, inset frames, progress bars, or routing/network/path line overlays.
composition_notes: The Tara-owned sensor image is composited into a new article-local cover with a distinct crop, smooth Tara color grade, and small status-light accents on the two real sensors. No visible overlay rectangles or connection/path lines are used.
negative_prompt: words, letters, numbers, logos, brand names, screenshots, fake chart, fake graph, diagram cover, routing lines, network lines, path overlays, translucent panels, inset frames, floating cards, progress bars
